title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs with a simple CLI and REST API; supports Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like); docker-run one-liner.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, async calls, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for Ollama; supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat, generate code, or refactor with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Example repo showing how to build a ChatGPT-like UI with Chainlit and Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official compose stacks including CPU & GPU variants plus WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in a single notebook.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that threads replies using Ollama models; deploy via Docker.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or generate text with Ollama.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI blocks for summarization and translation.
